info.title: GraceKelly
info.description: Independent orchestrator rebuilt from a clean slate.

200.description: Successful Response
Successful Response
Successful Response

schema.title: Response Readiness Probe Healthz Ready Get

200.description: Successful Response

schema.title: Response Readiness Api V1 Readiness Get

200.description: Successful Response

get.description: Returns the full model catalog with availability status. Browser-backed models include live observation metadata: when the model menu was last checked and whether the model label was confirmed.

200.description: Model catalog with adapter kind, provider, availability status, and observation timestamps

schema.title: Response Models Api V1 Models Get

post.description: Returns the current model catalog snapshot with a refreshed_at timestamp. Browser model availability reflects the last Playwright observation. A live Perplexity query is needed to update the model menu itself.

200.description: Successful Response

schema.title: Response Refresh Models Api V1 Models Refresh Post

post.summary: Submit a prompt for orchestrated execution
post.description: Submits a prompt to one or more models according to the specified execution plan. Supports dry-run, quorum, merge strategies, reasoning mode, and optional trace correlation. Executes synchronously and returns the final task snapshot for the completed request.

200.description: Final task snapshot with execution plan, steps, and terminal status

422.description: Validation error (unsupported model, invalid merge strategy, quorum conflict)

post.summary: Submit a prompt with file uploads for orchestrated execution

200.description: Successful Response

get.description: Returns a paginated list of recent tasks with step and event summaries. Supports filtering by status, execution mode, dry_run flag, and failure code. Use the `before` cursor (ISO timestamp) for keyset pagination.

parameters.name: before

schema.description: Cursor: accepted_at ISO timestamp for pagination
schema.title: Before

parameters.description: Cursor: accepted_at ISO timestamp for pagination

200.description: List of task summaries ordered by accepted_at descending

schema.title: Response List Tasks Api V1 Tasks Get

get.description: Returns the complete execution context for a task: plan scalars, all steps, and events. Events are paginated via `events_limit` / `events_offset` query parameters.

200.description: Full task view including steps and paginated events
Task exported as Markdown

post.summary: Retry a failed or cancelled task
post.description: Synchronously creates and executes a new task that replays the original prompt and execution plan. Only tasks with status `failed` or `cancelled` can be retried. The new task carries a `retry_of_task_id` link back to the original.

200.description: Final task snapshot for the retry linked back to the original task

409.description: Task status does not allow retry (not failed or cancelled)

422.description: Validation error reconstructing the retry request

200.description: Successful Response

post.description: Generates multiple response variations per round, clusters them by semantic similarity, and iterates until the top cluster reaches the consensus target. Requires an embeddings client to be configured.

200.description: Consensus result with score, cluster count, best response, and round statistics

400.description: Invalid model or no adapter available for the requested provider

get.description: Aggregates execution statistics from the last 100 tasks: success rate, average duration, and failure counts per model. Returns a ranked top-5 list by success rate alongside full per-model stats.

200.description: Aggregate model performance stats with top-5 ranking

503.description: Storage unavailable while reading task/step records

post.description: Classifies the prompt, assesses complexity, and selects the optimal execution pattern (single call, consensus V1, role-based, or decomposition) automatically. Override via `reliability_level` (quick/standard/high) or an explicit `pattern` name.

200.description: Answer with routing metadata: pattern used, complexity level, LLM call count

400.description: Invalid model, unknown pattern/reliability level, or conflicting options

post.description: Runs a single model on up to 20 prompts concurrently. Returns per-prompt results with individual success/failure status.

200.description: Batch execution results with per-prompt status and aggregate counts

400.description: Invalid model or no adapter available for the requested provider

422.description: Validation error (empty prompts list, prompt too long, or too many prompts)

post.description: Runs a prompt through a reliability-level-selected execution pattern. Set `multi_model=true` to fan out across all configured API providers and aggregate results.

200.description: Pipeline answer with pattern, reliability level, model list, and LLM call count

400.description: Invalid model, unknown reliability level, or no adapter available

get.description: Returns per-adapter status (ok / no_key) and embeddings client state. Overall status is 'healthy' only when all adapters and the embeddings client report ok. Protect this endpoint with GRACEKELLY_API_KEY in internet-facing deployments.

200.description: Detailed health with adapter list, embeddings status, and uptime

post.summary: Auto-routing smart execution with Consensus V2
post.description: Like /smart but uses the Consensus V2 engine when consensus is required: HAC clustering, cross-pollination, debate rounds, divergence handling, and dissenting-view extraction. Returns cluster confidence and dissenting perspectives alongside the best answer.

200.description: Answer with V2 consensus metadata: cluster confidence, dissenting views, consensus score

400.description: Invalid model, unknown pattern/reliability level, or conflicting options

post.summary: Run a Devil's Advocate debate round
post.description: Generates an initial position on the topic, then runs a structured debate: challenge (Devil's Advocate), defense, and improved final response. Optionally supply your own `initial_position` to skip the first LLM call.

200.description: Debate transcript: initial position, challenge, defense, improved response, and call count

400.description: Invalid model or no adapter available for the requested provider

post.description: Runs the same prompt on each requested model concurrently. When `analyze=true` and at least two models succeed, an additional LLM call summarizes differences, strengths, and the best answer.

200.description: Per-model answers with optional comparative analysis and aggregate success counts

422.description: Validation error (empty models list or prompt too long)

decompose.title: Decompose
decompose.description: Enable automatic decomposition for complex prompts
